# Instruktori.ge - Driving Instructor Marketplace in Georgia

> Instruktori.ge is a Georgian platform for finding, comparing, and booking certified driving instructors and driving schools across Georgia.

## What we do
- Connect students with certified driving instructors
- Allow comparison by price, rating, city, and transmission type (automatic/manual)
- Provide driving school listings and packages
- Track Georgian city driving exam schedules in real time

## Main Pages
- [Homepage](https://instruktori.ge/ka): Main landing page
- [Find Instructors](https://instruktori.ge/ka/find-instructors): Browse and filter driving instructors by city, price, rating, and transmission type
- [Find Driving Schools](https://instruktori.ge/ka/find-instructors?instructor_type=school): Browse and compare driving schools
- [For Instructors](https://instruktori.ge/ka/for-instructors): Join the platform as a driving instructor
- [For Driving Schools](https://instruktori.ge/ka/for-autoschools): Join the platform as a driving school
- [City Exam Monitor](https://instruktori.ge/ka/city-exam/monitor): Real-time Georgian city driving exam schedule tracker
- [City Exam Tips](https://instruktori.ge/ka/city-exam/tips): Tips for passing the Georgian city driving exam
- [City Exam Routes](https://instruktori.ge/ka/city-exam/routes): Common city exam routes in Georgia
- [City Exam Checklist](https://instruktori.ge/ka/city-exam/checklist): Checklist for the Georgian city driving exam

## Language
- Primary language: Georgian (ka)
- Also available in English (en)

## Contact
- Email: support@instruktori.ge
- Website: https://instruktori.ge
